case_title: SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY LAND TRUST VS. SABRINA VILLANUEVA ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY LAND TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT VILLANUEVA, SABRINA DOES 1 TO 5 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
